query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_spread, SUM(CASE WHEN modelTotal IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_model_total, SUM(CASE WHEN spreadEdge IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread_edge FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND sport LIKE '%ncaam%';
